The Visionary

17 years of artistry. A lifetime of passion.

Riya

Founder & Lead Makeup Artist

In 2008, armed with certifications from India's premier beauty academies and medical training under MBBS practitioners, Riya embarked on a mission: to transform not just appearances, but confidence itself. What began as a passion for artistry has evolved into Heighten Makeovers—where luxury meets expertise, and every client becomes a masterpiece.

17+ Years Experience
Certified Professional
Medical Training
2008

The Beginning

Started as a certified makeup artist with professional academy credentials and medical training under MBBS practitioners. A vision was born: to redefine beauty standards in Gurugram.

2008 - 2015

Mastering the Craft

Specialized in bridal artistry, building a reputation across Gurugram for flawless transformations. Continued advanced certifications and perfected signature techniques.

2015 - 2020

Expanding Excellence

Assembled a team of expert beauty professionals. Introduced premium treatments and integrated medical-grade skincare into services, setting new industry standards.

2020 - Present

Heighten Makeovers

Established a luxury salon & spa destination in Sector 99. Award-winning transformations, cutting-edge treatments, and a commitment to making every client feel extraordinary.

Setting New Standards in Beauty
"

Beauty is not just about appearance—it's about how you feel when you look in the mirror. My mission is to help every client see their most confident, radiant self.

"

— Riya, Founder
